{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = obelisks (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Stone monuments covered in rings of script blink into existence during the event.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|In Obelisk, recruitment happens at the top of the Tower.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
